projectDescription: A web application for visualizing Linux process network connections with interactive diagrams and detailed connection tables.
keyFeatures: Interactive network diagram visualization with React Flow
Real-time process and connection monitoring using Linux ss command
Detailed listener information with address descriptions
publicApiSurface: GET /api/connections - Retrieve all network listeners and established connections
POST /api/connections/kill - Terminate a process by PID
ConnectionsData - Main data structure with listeners and connections arrays
Listener type - Process listener information including PID, port, address, Docker status
Connection type - Established connection information with source and destination details
getConnectionsData() - Core function to gather system connection data
